start.title: Welcome to Pepka!
start.message:
🐸 Welcome to Pepka Bot!

I'm Pepka, your gaming companion! Click, battle, and earn tokens!

Choose your language:

help.title: Help
help.message:
📖 **Pepka Bot Commands**

/start - Start the game
/profile - View your profile
/click - Click to earn tokens
/combat - Battle enemies
/inventory - View items
/leaderboard - View rankings
/shop - Buy tokens
/stats - View statistics

shop.title: Shop
shop.confirm: Are you sure you want to buy {package}?

messages.error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
messages.unauthorized: ❌ You are not authorized to use this command.
messages.maintenance: 🔧 Bot is under maintenance. Please try again later.
